installCommand: if cd flutter; then git checkout stable && git pull && cd .. ; else git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable; fi && flutter/bin/flutter doctor && flutter/bin/flutter clean && flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && flutter/bin/flutter pub get
buildCommand: echo "API_KEY=$API_KEY" > .env && flutter/bin/flutter pub run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs && flutter/bin/flutter build web --release
